en: I don't know what you think you're doing.
ko: 당신이 뭘 하고 있다고 생각하는지 모르겠어요.

en: I'm doing the sensible thing, the responsible thing. We're not careful.
ko: 저는 이성적인 일을 하고 있어요, 책임감 있는 일을요. 우리는 조심하지 않아요.

en: If I go on another 20, 25 years,
a tired, white-haired, geriatric queen
will hand over to a tired, white-haired,
ko: 지친 백발의 노인 웨일스 왕자에게 넘길 거예요. 그게 규칙이에요.

en: geriatric Prince of Wales. Those are the rules.
But if he were then to go on another 20, 25 years,
it would mean that for the next half century, the British monarchy would be
a very decrepit experience indeed.
ko: 그게 그 기관에 대한 올바른 일인가요?

en: Is that the right thing to do to the institution?
Charles is in the prime of his life now.
ko: 솔직히, 이렇게 말도 안 되는 소리는 처음 들어요.

en: Honestly, I've never heard so much nonsense.
Have you forgotten the oath that you took?
ko: 저는 여러분 모두 앞에서 선언합니다. 제 인생 전체가,

en: I declare before you all that my whole life,
whether it be long or short,
shall be devoted to your service.
ko: 당신은 말도 탈 수 있고 운전도 할 수 있으니,

en: You're fit enough to ride and drive,
so you're fit enough to wear the crown.
ko: 메리 여왕이 당신에게 뭐라고 했는지 기억하나요?

en: You remember what Queen Mary told you?
Not a geriatric.
